headlines.title: Card volume rises with digital boost
headlines.summary: Volume on Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover cards issued in the U.S. climbed 6.4% last year over 2024, with an assist from digital plays, according to Nilson Report’s publisher.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, visa ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
political_items.summary: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

political_items.title: German males under 45 may need military approval for long stays abroad
political_items.summary: Under the law, travel approvals must generally be granted and it remains unclear how the rule would be enforced if breached.

political_items.title: Russian attack on Ukraine market kills five
political_items.summary: A Russian drone hit a busy spot in the southern Ukrainian town on Saturday morning, injuring another 21 people.

political_items.title: World's oldest leader to get a deputy for first time in 43-year rule
political_items.summary: Cameroon's President Paul Biya, 93, won his eighth successive term last year in a disputed election.
